screens: Splash Screen - Animated glassmorphism logo with progress indicator
Dashboard - 6 KPI cards, weekly fuel bar chart, alerts, activity feed
Fleet Screen - Truck list with contract grouping, swipe-to-edit/delete
Fuel Screen - Fuel purchase logging with station/amount/cost/date tracking
Maintenance Screen - Service records with status filtering
Loads Screen - Product load tracking with pickup/dropoff locations
Reports Screen - Overview, fuel, maintenance, and load reports with charts
Profile Screen - User settings and logout
Truck Detail - Full truck history (fuel, maintenance, loads)
Driver Detail - License info, contact, assigned vehicle
Contract Detail - Client info, fleet, drivers, routes, loads
features: Dark theme with glassmorphism UI throughout
Real-time activity feed with staggered animations
Demo data initialization with realistic fleet data
